centroid_summary: These prompts define agents that plan, gather, evaluate, synthesize, and finalize evidence-based research or analysis workflows, often coordinating multi-step information retrieval and reporting.
guided_start_description: Use this agent to run a structured research process that searches for information, identifies gaps, and produces a reliable final report or analysis.

centroid_summary: Agents in this cluster analyze market, chart, sentiment, and risk signals to recommend or debate concrete trading actions such as buy, sell, hold, long, or short.
guided_start_description: Use this role when you want an AI trading specialist to evaluate financial or prediction market data and produce a clear trade recommendation or risk-based viewpoint.

centroid_summary: Prompts in this cluster define structured, phase-aware workflow roles that plan, execute, summarize, review, or validate work using explicit inputs, constraints, and output formats.
guided_start_description: Use this role when you want an agent to operate as a step in a larger pipeline, with clear phase context, prescribed tasks, and standardized deliverables.
sample_agents: BASE - AGENT ROLE TEMPLATE, BASE - DATA PREVIEW, BASE - EXPERIENCE WITH SUGGESTION, BASE - EXTRACT TOOLS, BASE - FEATURE INFO

centroid_summary: Agents in this cluster perform or coordinate practical data science workflows such as data loading, wrangling, feature engineering, visualization planning, and machine learning code generation.
guided_start_description: Use this role when you want an AI teammate to help route, prepare, analyze, visualize, or model tabular data in an end-to-end data science workflow.
sample_agents: ROUTING - Question Router, DATA_CLEANING_AGENT - Create Data Cleaner Code, DATA_CLEANING_AGENT - Fix Data Cleaner Code, DATA_CLEANING_AGENT - Recommend Data Cleaning Steps, DATA_LOADER_AGENT - Run React Tool-Calling Agent

centroid_summary: Agents in this cluster help users find products by searching a product database, judging result relevance, and responding clearly when matches are weak or unavailable.
guided_start_description: Use this assistant to search for products, evaluate which results best match a shopper’s request, and explain next steps when no exact items are found.
sample_agents: AGENT_PROMPT_BY_JSON - Product Search Agent (JSON Version), AGENT_PROMPT_BY_SUPERLINKED - Product Search Agent (Superlinked Version), AMAZON_SEARCH_PROMPT - Product Search Assistant, ASSISTANT_SYSTEM - Main AI Assistant Role, BLOG_SEARCH_PROMPT - Blog Search Assistant

centroid_summary: This cluster contains narrowly scoped helper agents that perform specific support tasks such as answering from a knowledge base, checking compliance, summarizing or generating short content, and scoring simple inputs.
guided_start_description: Use this role when you want a lightweight task-specific assistant for a single workflow step like Q&A, review, rating, or short-form content generation.

centroid_summary: Agents in this cluster perform narrow retrieval-support tasks such as generating search tags, filtering whether deeper analysis is needed, querying research sources, and producing short relevance summaries or questions from user input.
guided_start_description: Use this assistant when you want help turning a request into search terms, lightweight retrieval decisions, concise match explanations, or short queryable outputs for research and discovery workflows.
sample_agents: MULTIQUERY - Multi-Perspective Question Generator, ARXIV SEARCH TOOL - Command Docstring, CHAT_QUESTION_GENERATOR, CHAT.PY - GitHub Search Optimization Expert, DECISION.PY - Minimal Resource-Efficient Filtering Agent

centroid_summary: Agents in this cluster help users design, build, test, and refine Ruby on Rails applications with an MVP-first, small-safe-diff workflow and strong product guidance.
guided_start_description: Use this assistant to brainstorm features or incrementally implement, test, and polish a Rails app with clear step-by-step progress and cautious code changes.
sample_agents: RAILS_AGENT_PROMPT (Rails Engineer/Product Advisor), RAILS_AI_BUILDER_AGENT_PROMPT (LangGraph Agent Architect), RAILS_FRONTEND_STARTER_AGENT_PROMPT (Front-End Designer/Product Advisor), RAILS_QA_SOFTWARE_ENGINEER_PROMPT (QA/Test Builder), USER_FEEDBACK_AGENT_PROMPT (Feedback/Requirements Brainstorming Partner)

centroid_summary: These agents parse structured trading text and return only a specific requested numeric field such as price or size.

centroid_summary: Agents in this cluster identify hardware constraints from user requests and assess whether a project's dependencies are compatible with a target hardware environment.
guided_start_description: Use this agent to detect device or resource limits like CPU-only, low-memory, or mobile targets and verify if a dependency stack can run under those hardware constraints.
